T(h)end,function(d,J)local T=x(J)local p=function()return o(d,{},J,T)end return p end,function(d,J)local T=x(J)local p=function(p,N)return o(d,{p;N},J,T)end return p end,function(d,J)local T=x(J)local return(P(1028235+4856187,{}))(T(h))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[J(-741569+769290)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
